title: SNDL (SNDL) Q2 2025 Earnings Transcript
text: The company reported a net loss of $106 million ($1.76 per share GAAP basis) and adjusted net loss of $33 million ($0.56 per share). Adjusted EBITDA reached $170.2 million, representing a $141 million sequential increase in the Refining segment. Management increased EOP guidance to $130 million to $170 million on a run rate basis for the second half, up from the prior $120 million target. The company achieved $30 million in EOP improvements during the quarter and increased run rate guidance accordingly. Shareholders received $16 million in dividends and $13 million in share repurchases during the quarter. Record system throughput was achieved across multiple refineries, with realized refining margins increasing $0.96 per barrel year-over-year.
